ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographic_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "aland10" INTEGER /* Land area of the block in square meters */,
  "awater10" INTEGER /* Water area of the block in square meters */,
  "blockce10" TEXT /* Census block code */,
  "countyfp10" TEXT /* County FIPS code */,
  "funcstat10" TEXT /* Functional status code */,
  "geoid10" TEXT /* GEOID10 code for the block */,
  "intptlat10" REAL /* Latitude of the internal point of the block */,
  "intptlon10" REAL /* Longitude of the internal point of the block */,
  "lodes" INTEGER /* LODES (Longitudinal Employer-Household Dynamics) value */,
  "mtfcc10" TEXT /* MAF/TIGER Feature Class Code */,
  "name10" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "statefp10" TEXT /* State FIPS code */,
  "tractce10" TEXT /* Census tract code */,
  "uace10" TEXT /* Urban Area Code */,
  "uatyp10" TEXT /* Urban Area Type */,
  "ur10" TEXT /* Urban/Rural indicator */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric representation of the block */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Internal ID for the block */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the block */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the block */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the block */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the block */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the block */,
  "land_use_types" TEXT /* Types of land use in the block */,
  "green_space_area" INTEGER /* Area of green spaces in square meters */,
  "water_bodies" TEXT /* Information about water bodies in the block */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_blocks_statefp10 FOREIGN KEY ("statefp10") REFERENCES states ("statefp10"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_blocks_countyfp10 FOREIGN KEY ("countyfp10") REFERENCES counties ("countyfp10"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_blocks_uace10 FOREIGN KEY ("uace10") REFERENCES urban_areas ("uace10")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "countyfp10" TEXT /* County FIPS code */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "statefp10" TEXT /* State FIPS code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the county */,
  "land_use_types" TEXT /* Types of land use in the county */,
  "green_space_area" INTEGER /* Area of green spaces in the county in square meters */,
  "water_bodies" TEXT /* Information about water bodies in the county */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "statefp10" TEXT /* State FIPS code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the state */,
  "land_use_types" TEXT /* Types of land use in the state */,
  "green_space_area" INTEGER /* Area of green spaces in the state in square meters */,
  "water_bodies" TEXT /* Information about water bodies in the state */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_areas" (
  "uarea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban area */,
  "uace10" TEXT /* Urban Area Code */,
  "uatyp10" TEXT /* Urban Area Type */,
  "uarea_name" TEXT /* Name of the urban area */,
  "statefp10" TEXT /* State FIPS code */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the urban area */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the urban area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the urban area */,
  "land_use_types" TEXT /* Types of land use in the urban area */,
  "green_space_area" INTEGER /* Area of green spaces in the urban area in square meters */,
  "water_bodies" TEXT /* Information about water bodies in the urban area */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uarea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the user data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
